problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: Combining Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
